fields.tagline: Trucking & Brokerage Solutions â€” Reliable Â· Scalable Â· On-Time
fields.footer_blurb: Nationwide trucking & freight solutions across all 48 U.S. states and Canada. OTR, Drayage, Warehousing & Cross-Border â€” backed by a vetted carrier network.
fields.meta_description: Augustus Corp â€” End-to-end logistics solutions. Reliable, scalable, on-time freight across the US and Canada. OTR, Drayage, Warehousing & Cross-Border.

fields.question: What areas do you cover?
fields.answer: We provide transportation solutions across all 48 contiguous U.S. states and full coverage across Canada, including major ports, rail ramps, and distribution hubs.

fields.question: What types of transportation do you specialize in?
fields.answer: We specialise in OTR (Dry Van, Reefer & Flatbed), Drayage (ports & rail ramps), Warehousing & Storage, Cross-Border USâ€“Canada, FTL, Reefer, and Heavy-Haul & Specialized freight.

fields.question: Do you have your own trucks or are you a broker?
fields.answer: We operate as a freight brokerage with a strong vetted carrier network. Every carrier is vetted for safety, compliance, and reliability â€” giving you consistent, trusted capacity.

fields.question: Can you handle time-sensitive or urgent shipments?
fields.answer: Yes â€” we prioritise expedited and time-critical shipments with dedicated carrier capacity and fast response times. Contact our dispatch team directly for urgent loads.

fields.question: What makes Augustus Corp different?
fields.answer: Our vetted carrier network, competitive transparent pricing, 24/7 operations visibility, and dedicated account support set us apart. We build long-term partnerships, not one-off transactions.

fields.question: What shipment types do you handle?
fields.answer: We handle Dry Van, Reefer, Flatbed, FTL, Drayage (port & rail), Warehousing, Heavy-Haul (Lowboys, Double Drops, RGNs), Hazmat, and Cross-Border USAâ€“Canada shipments.

fields.question: Which ports and rail yards do you serve?
fields.answer: We serve major US ports and rail terminals including LA/Long Beach, and key inland intermodal hubs across the country, with full Canada coverage for cross-border moves.

fields.question: How do I get a freight quote?
fields.answer: Fill out our online quote form or contact us directly at 803-666-8368 or garry@augustusbrokerage.com. Provide your origin, destination, freight type, and weight â€” we respond within 24 hours.

fields.question: Is there a minimum shipment size?
fields.answer: No minimum â€” we handle everything from partial loads to full truckloads. Contact us to discuss your specific freight requirements and we'll find the right solution.

fields.question: Do you handle hazardous materials?
fields.answer: Yes. We ensure fully compliant handling of regulated goods (hazmat) in line with DOT and FMCSA requirements. Please disclose hazmat classification when requesting a quote.

fields.name: Automotive
fields.description: Precision freight for OEM components, finished vehicles, and production-critical parts. Dedicated flatbeds, enclosed carriers, and just-in-time delivery keep assembly lines running across North America â€” zero delays, zero excuses.

fields.name: Technology & Electronics
fields.description: Secure, time-critical shipping for semiconductors, high-value electronics, and tech hardware. White-glove handling, real-time tracking, and expedited lanes protect your cargo from factory floor to data center â€” anywhere in the world.

fields.name: Healthcare & Pharma
fields.description: GDP-compliant cold chain and temperature-controlled logistics for pharmaceuticals, biologics, and medical devices. Validated reefer units, strict chain-of-custody, and 24/7 monitoring ensure product integrity from origin to patient.

fields.name: Industrial & Manufacturing
fields.description: Heavy-haul, over-dimensional, and just-in-time freight for industrial machinery, capital equipment, and manufactured goods. Full permit management, specialized rigging, and cross-border expertise keep your production schedules on track.

fields.name: Consumer & Retail
fields.description: High-volume transport for consumer goods from production to distribution center to retail shelf. Reliable capacity for seasonal peaks, promotional launches, and everyday replenishment â€” delivered on time, every time.

fields.name: Aerospace & Defense
fields.description: Security-compliant logistics for aerospace components, defense cargo, and government freight. ITAR-registered carriers, customs clearance expertise, and cleared handling teams move sensitive loads safely across domestic and international corridors.

fields.name: Energy & Oil & Gas
fields.description: Specialized heavy freight for oilfield equipment, pipe, project cargo, and energy sector supplies. Dedicated permit management and over-dimensional expertise across US shale basins and UAE energy corridors keep your operations running.

fields.name: Food & Beverage
fields.description: Temperature-controlled transport for fresh produce, frozen goods, and packaged foods. Multi-temp reefer fleets, FSMA-compliant carriers, and strict cold chain protocols preserve product quality from origin farm to retail shelf.

fields.name: OTR Transportation
fields.description: Long-haul OTR coverage across all 48 U.S. states and Canada. We operate Dry Van, Reefer, and Flatbed equipment â€” backed by a strong vetted carrier network to guarantee capacity and keep your freight on schedule.

fields.name: Drayage Services
fields.description: Seamless container movement from major ports and rail ramps across the U.S. We handle the short-haul leg between port and warehouse â€” fast turnaround and reliable chassis management.

fields.name: Warehousing & Storage
fields.description: Flexible warehousing and storage solutions to support your supply chain. Short-term overflow or ongoing distribution support â€” secure, accessible storage integrated with your transportation operations.

fields.name: Cross-Border USâ€“Canada
fields.description: Smooth cross-border transportation between the United States and Canada. Our team manages customs documentation, border compliance, and carrier coordination so your freight crosses without delays.

fields.name: Full Truckload (FTL)
fields.description: Dedicated capacity for your freight â€” no co-loading, faster transit, and lower risk of damage. Ideal for time-sensitive or high-value shipments where reliability and speed matter most.

fields.name: Reefer (Temperature-Controlled)
fields.description: Temperature-controlled trucking for food, beverages, pharmaceuticals, and other sensitive cargo. We maintain precise temperature ranges from origin to destination, ensuring cold chain integrity throughout.

fields.name: Heavy-Haul & Specialized
fields.description: Specialized heavy-haul and oversized freight transportation. Our fleet includes Lowboys, Double Drops, RGNs, Extendable Flatbeds, and Multi-Axle Units â€” with full compliance and permitting support.

fields.name: David Harrington
fields.review: Augustus Brokerage handled our OTR moves across 12 states seamlessly. Their vetted carrier network gave us consistent capacity even during peak season when other brokers fell through.

fields.name: Maria Santos
fields.review: The reefer coordination from Augustus is outstanding. Our produce arrives on time and in perfect condition â€” cold chain integrity is never compromised.

fields.name: James Whitmore
fields.review: Their drayage team at LA/Long Beach is the most reliable we've worked with. Fast response, no port delays â€” they've transformed our import operations.

fields.name: Angela Park
fields.review: We switched to Augustus for our cross-border Canada runs and the difference was immediate â€” better rates, better transit times, and a team that actually picks up the phone.

With a strong vetted carrier network and commitment to service quality, compliance, and transparency, we keep your supply chain moving.
highlights: OTR â€” Dry Van, Reefer & Flatbed
Drayage at major ports & rail ramps

fields.name: Augustus Transport
fields.description: Domiciled in Swansea, SC, Augustus Transport is a full-service domestic trucking carrier purpose-built for the demands of modern American commerce. We operate a modern, owner-operated fleet delivering first- and last-mile drayage excellence at two of the East Coast's busiest gateways â€” the Port of Savannah, GA and the Port of Charleston, SC. From container pickup to inland delivery, our drivers keep supply chains moving reliably and on schedule.
highlights: Full Truckload (FTL) across the contiguous US
Drayage at Port of Savannah, GA
Drayage at Port of Charleston, SC
Dedicated contract carriage for high-volume shippers

fields.name: Augustus Logistics
fields.description: Operating from Dubai, UAE, Augustus Logistics is the Group's international arm â€” providing comprehensive third-party logistics (3PL) services across the Gulf Cooperation Council and beyond. From FCL/LCL sea freight and bonded warehousing to customs clearance, cargo insurance, and last-mile distribution, we orchestrate complex international shipments so your business can move without borders.
highlights: Sea Freight â€” FCL & LCL worldwide
Jebel Ali (JAFZA) & Dubai World Central drayage
Real-time cargo tracking, origin to delivery

fields.title: OTR Truck Driver (CDL-A)
fields.description: OTR driver for long-haul dry van routes across all 48 states. Minimum 2 years OTR experience required. Competitive pay, benefits, and home time.

fields.title: Freight Operations Coordinator
fields.description: Coordinate daily freight movements across OTR, drayage, and cross-border lanes. Track loads, manage carrier communication, and resolve transit issues proactively.

fields.description: Dispatch drayage moves at LA/Long Beach and surrounding rail terminals. Experience with port operations and container tracking required.

fields.title: Business Development Representative
fields.description: Generate new freight accounts across manufacturing, retail, and e-commerce sectors. Cold outreach, follow-up, and RFP experience in trucking or freight forwarding required.

fields.title: Carrier Relations Manager
fields.description: Build and maintain relationships with vetted OTR and cross-border carriers. Negotiate rates, manage compliance documentation, and grow the carrier network.

fields.title: Logistics & Admin Officer
fields.description: Support invoicing, freight billing, carrier payments, and internal reporting. Experience with TMS platforms and freight accounting preferred.
